sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 124 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.1. 2. For hearing of CMA No.852/2025. 3. For hearing of main case. 01.04.2026 Mr. Shams Mohiuddin Ansari, advocate for the applicant. Mr. Irfan Mir Halepota, advocate for the respondent. It is jointly pointed out that the impugned orders of the learned Appellate Tribunal as well as that of the adjudicating officer are devoid of any independent discussion or deliberation and merely rendered on surmises and reproduction, therefore, it is sought that respective orders be set aside and the matter be remanded back to the adjudicating officer for adjudication afresh in accordance with law. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
